items.name: Scared Ghost Spider Shoulder Buddy
items.description:
This shy little ghost clings to your shoulder, scrunching its eyes shut as if hiding from the world. A tiny spider dangles cheerfully from one of the webs, as if keeping the ghost company (or maybe teasing it just a little). Together, they’re the cutest pair of fright you’ll ever carry around!

 IN OTHER COLORS AND ACCESSORIES: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=ghost&Category=1&CreatorName=purple_daisy70&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3

items.name: White Metallic Vacanza Bag
items.description:
A glamorous New Year collection designed to shine through midnight moments and unforgettable celebrations. Featuring elegant silhouettes, soft textures, sparkling details, and dreamy colors, this collection blends femininity, confidence, and festive luxury.
